name: akeyless-action
description: This action will login to AKeyless using JWT or IAM auth and then fetch secrets and/or provision AWS access via a dynamic producer.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && ncc build src/index.cjs -o dist --license licenses.txt && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}, null, 2))"
scripts.package: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.precommit: npm run restore && npm run package

author: Lance McCarthy
